name: shogun
description: A wise old Edo period Japanese shogun with white beard, black and gold kamishimo (formal samurai attire), dignified expression, jidaigeki style

name: hime
description: An elegant Edo period Japanese princess in colorful uchikake kimono with ornate hairpins, graceful posture

name: samurai
description: Samurai castle guards in traditional armor holding yari spears, standing at attention, stern expression

name: crowd
description: Edo period Japanese townsfolk in colorful yukata and kimono, joyful expressions, enjoying the festival

name: edojou
description: Grand Edo castle great hall interior with wooden pillars, golden sliding doors (fusuma), tatami floor, warm lantern light, hanging scrolls

name: matsuri
description: Edo period Japanese castle town festival with falling cherry blossoms, red paper lanterns, food stalls, bustling crowd

name: jidaigeki
description: Japanese jidaigeki historical drama style, Edo period atmosphere, cinematic composition, warm color palette, detailed traditional period costumes
